home.heroDesc: Led data analysis and insight delivery for major enterprise clients including LG Electronics, Samsung, and Hyundai Department Store at an offline retail visitor behavior analytics SaaS platform.
home.heroDesc2: I transform ambiguous business needs into structured analytical frameworks and design end-to-end analysis pipelines to support client decision-making.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: GeonU Park | Data Scientist (DA Team Lead) | mAy-I Inc.
about.education: Korea University | Major: Psychology, Convergence: Language, Brain & Computer
about.certs: Business Information Visualization, Big Data Analyst, SQLD, ADsP
about.profileDesc: Joined mAy-I as its first Data Analyst and grew the team from 0 to 3 members. Analyzed offline store visitor behavior data for major retail enterprises including LG Electronics, Samsung, Hyundai Department Store, and Shinsegae. Worked directly with client stakeholders to identify field problems and solve them with data and AI solutions. Led all aspects of DA work: analysis pipeline design, custom KPI development, client report production, and AI model quality management.
